text.title: View Product Features
text.description: The iPhone 13 CH is Apple's new flagship mobile phone that has entered the market with several new features and a dual camera. The iPhone 13 display is equipped with a Super Retina panel to provide very desirable images to the user. This display has a very high resolution; so much so that in its 6.1-inch size, it packs about 460 pixels per inch. It is possible to charge the battery of this phone wirelessly. Face detection using the front camera is another feature used in the new Apple iPhone. In terms of hardware, this phone uses the new A15 chip, which has 15 billion transistors and offers desirable heat control so that, in addition to normal tasks, it can support new virtual reality features that Apple is particularly focusing on these days. According to Apple itself, this phone is 50 times faster than its version 12. The processor has a new modular design that has significantly reduced battery consumption, giving you higher battery life. The display quality on the iPhone 13 is 120 Hz and you will witness high quality. Apple has included a GPU in this series of its iPhone phones that is 30 percent faster than its series 12 phones, and this promises that you can run games with heavier and larger graphics and maps. One of the features we see in the iPhone 13 is its cinematic ProRes video recording system, which can revolutionize mobile phone videography. Not active phones become active by inserting internal SIM cards, and unlike the active model, the product seal is not broken. Active Apple brand phones are also like this because due to limitations on some Apple products for Iran, they are officially activated and sealed with a single insertion of a SIM card in neighboring countries, and you should know that this process does not cause any problems regarding the product warranty. European, Japanese, and UAE part numbers are single SIM, and UAE-related part numbers do not support FaceTime either. With the JA (Japan) part number, even in silent mode, the photo shutter sound cannot be muted.

descriptions: Apple, as one of the most recognized names in the technology industry, is known for its innovative designs and high build quality. The company's products, including MacBooks, have always been associated with high standards of quality and performance. On the other hand, Asus, a Taiwanese brand, by offering products with competitive pricing and high diversity in models, has been able to gain a significant position in the global market. Focusing on innovation and offering products with diverse features, Asus provides numerous options for all types of users.

The purpose of this comparison is to accurately and comprehensively review two top brands in the laptop industry. We not only address technical and functional specifications, but also consider aspects such as user experience, design, price, and purchase value. This comparison helps audiences make a suitable choice according to their needs and lifestyle with a better understanding of each brand's features. Also, this review can serve as a buying guide for individuals who are evaluating available options in the market.

content.title: History of Apple Company
descriptions: Apple, as one of the most recognized names in the technology industry, is known for its innovative designs and high build quality. The company's products, including MacBooks, have always been associated with high standards of quality and performance. On the other hand, Asus, a Taiwanese brand, by offering products with competitive pricing and high diversity in models, has been able to gain a significant position in the global market. Focusing on innovation and offering products with diverse features, Asus provides numerous options for all types of users.

In the 1980s, Apple revolutionized the computer industry by introducing the Macintosh, which was the first personal computer with a graphical user interface and a mouse. This device not only introduced new standards in computer design and usability, but also demonstrated Apple's focus on innovation and quality.

In the following decades, Apple faced ups and downs, but with the return of Steve Jobs in 1997, a new era of innovation and success began. The introduction of the iMac, iPod, iPhone, and then iPad, turned Apple into one of the pioneers of the tech industry. In the field of laptops, MacBooks defined new standards with their unique design, high build quality, and powerful performance.

content.title: Ergonomic Features
descriptions: Asus, which was founded in Taiwan in 1989, initially started as a motherboard manufacturing company. Over time, by developing its products in various fields of technology, mobile, and of course laptops, Asus was able to

Focusing on innovation and providing quality products, Asus was able to consolidate its position in the competitive global market. In the laptop sector, Asus covered the needs of various users, including professionals, students, and gamers, by introducing different series such as ZenBook, VivoBook, and ROG (Republic of Gamers). Asus has also been a pioneer in producing convertible laptops and ultrabooks.

Key developments in laptop manufacturing from the 1990s to the present include significant advances in various fields such as hardware, software, design, and connectivity features. Among these developments are the reduction in weight and size of laptops, increased processing power, improved display quality, and increased battery life. Also, with advancements in wireless technologies and connectivity, laptops have become highly connected and versatile devices.

Meanwhile, Apple and Asus have each uniquely played an important role in these developments. Apple with a focus on design, build quality, and hardware-software integration, and Asus with a focus on innovation, product diversity, and competitive pricing, have each been influential in their own right.

content.title: Conclusion
descriptions: In this article, we made a detailed comparison between Apple and Asus laptops in various fields. Apple, with its MacBooks, offers superior build quality, beautiful design, powerful performance, and a seamless user experience. Asus, on the other hand, with greater diversity in models and prices, provides more varied options for users with different needs and budgets.

For buyers looking for high quality, powerful performance, and a seamless user experience who have a sufficient budget, Apple MacBooks are a suitable option. On the other hand, if a user is looking for more variety in models, more diverse prices, and flexibility in choosing hardware and features, Asus laptops are considered good choices.

In the future, it can be expected that both Apple and Asus will continue to innovate and improve their products. Apple will likely focus on optimizing the M-series chips and further integrating hardware and software, while Asus may continue to offer greater product diversity and innovative technologies. Also, attention to environmental sustainability and data security will be important aspects that will likely be considered in future product development.

text.title: View Product Features
text.description: The iPhone 13 CH is Apple's new flagship mobile phone that has entered the market with several new features and a dual camera. The iPhone 13 display is equipped with a Super Retina panel to provide very desirable images to the user. This display has a very high resolution; so much so that in its 6.1-inch size, it packs about 460 pixels per inch. It is possible to charge the battery of this phone wirelessly. Face detection using the front camera is another feature used in the new Apple iPhone. In terms of hardware, this phone uses the new A15 chip, which has 15 billion transistors and offers desirable heat control so that, in addition to normal tasks, it can support new virtual reality features that Apple is particularly focusing on these days. According to Apple itself, this phone has a speed 50 times that of its version 12. The processor has a new modular design that has significantly reduced battery consumption, giving you greater battery life. The display quality on the iPhone 13 is 120 Hz and you will witness high quality. Apple has included a GPU in this series of its iPhone phones that is 30 percent faster than its series 12 phones, and this promises that you can run games with heavier and larger graphics and maps. One of the features we see in the iPhone 13 is its cinematic ProRes video recording system, which can revolutionize mobile phone videography. Not active phones become active by inserting internal SIM cards, and unlike the active model, the product seal is not broken. Active Apple brand phones are also like this because due to limitations on some Apple products for Iran, they are officially activated and sealed with a single insertion of a SIM card in neighboring countries, and you should know that this process does not cause any problems regarding the product warranty. European, Japanese, and UAE part numbers are single SIM, and UAE-related part numbers do not support FaceTime either. With the JA (Japan) part number, even in silent mode, the photo shutter sound cannot be muted.

itemedtails.title: Review and Analysis
itemedtails.description: Undoubtedly, Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra is one of the flagship smartphones available in the market that can provide very good and wonderful performance in various sections. At first glance, you will completely realize that you are facing a powerful and flagship smartphone. Attractive and even different design that has given a special visual appeal to this smartphone. On the front view, you see a uniform and very beautiful display equipped with an Infinity-O notch design. The circular notch cutout at the top left corner of the screen houses the selfie camera sensor. The curvature of the screen on the sides has also minimized the bezels, and ultimately 91.4% of the front view is dedicated to the screen. The fingerprint sensor, as a very practical security feature, is placed under the screen, and according to tests, you should know that this optical sensor can provide very fast performance in unlocking the screen.

itemedtails.title: Attractive Design
itemedtails.description: Apple is not very willing to change its successful designs and prefers to maintain its successful and attractive design language. The iPhone 13 also benefits from a similar design to its previous generation. On the front view, we see the familiar notch and cutout of previous series, which this time has a smaller width compared to the iPhone 12 screen notch. On the back view, we also see the placement of two camera sensors which, unlike the iPhone 12 model, are placed diagonally with an LED flash in a square cutout. This is while the two camera sensors on the back of the iPhone 12 are placed next to each other in a columnar layout.

itemedtails.title: Camera
itemedtails.description: Perhaps at first glance and on paper, the camera sensors considered for iPhone 13 do not differ much from the camera sensors of iPhone 12, but undoubtedly iPhone 13 can perform better in this section compared to the iPhone 12 model. You might ask why? We will tell you below. First, we will take a look at the specifications of the camera sensors considered for this smartphone. A main camera sensor with a resolution of 12 megapixels, f/1.6 aperture, 26mm focal length of wide type along with an ultra-wide camera sensor with a resolution of 12 megapixels, f/2.4 aperture, 120-degree viewing angle, and 13mm focal length make up the dual cameras of the iPhone 13. For the selfie camera, a 12-megapixel wide sensor with f/2.2 aperture is considered, which can also record 4K video at 60 fps. But why can iPhone 13 with similar camera sensors to iPhone 12 deliver higher quality image output? The main reason for this is the more powerful processor considered for iPhone 13.

itemedtails.descriptionFivd: Apple flagships have always had a lot to say in the field of video recording, and still, none of the company's Android competitors have been able to perform better than Apple flagships in videography. The main camera sensor of this smartphone is capable of recording video with a maximum 4K quality at 60 fps. This camera sensor is equipped with the very attractive OIS or optical image stabilization feature. A feature that perfectly removes unwanted shakes when recording video and ultimately provides you with a very high-quality video output. Like the previous generation, the camera sensor of this phone is also capable of recording cinematic video, which is the highest possible video recording quality among all flagships in the world. But this time Apple has considered significant improvements for the video recording section of this smartphone to easily meet the needs of a professional videographer as well. The very amazing auto-focus of this camera, thanks to artificial intelligence or AI, has shown a unique performance. Auto-focus between people's faces (for example, two people are present in the camera frame and the focus is on the face of the front person, as soon as the first person turns their head and looks at the next person, the camera automatically focuses on the second person) is one of the new and very attractive features of this powerful smartphone.

text.title: View Product Features
text.description: The iPhone 13 CH is Apple's new flagship mobile phone that has entered the market with several new features and a dual camera. The iPhone 13 display is equipped with a Super Retina panel to provide very desirable images to the user. This display has a very high resolution; so much so that in its 6.1-inch size, it packs about 460 pixels per inch. It is possible to charge the battery of this phone wirelessly. Face detection using the front camera is another feature used in the new Apple iPhone. In terms of hardware, this phone uses the new A15 chip, which has 15 billion transistors and offers desirable heat control so that, in addition to normal tasks, it can support new virtual reality features that Apple is particularly focusing on these days. According to Apple itself, this phone has a speed 50 times that of its version 12. The processor has a new modular design that has significantly reduced battery consumption, giving you greater battery life. The display quality on the iPhone 13 is 120 Hz and you will witness high quality. Apple has included a GPU in this series of its iPhone phones that is 30 percent faster than its series 12 phones, and this promises that you can run games with heavier and larger graphics and maps. One of the features we see in the iPhone 13 is its cinematic ProRes video recording system, which can revolutionize mobile phone videography. Not active phones become active by inserting internal SIM cards, and unlike the active model, the product seal is not broken. Active Apple brand phones are also like this because due to limitations on some Apple products for Iran, they are officially activated and sealed with a single insertion of a SIM card in neighboring countries, and you should know that this process does not cause any problems regarding the product warranty. European, Japanese, and UAE part numbers are single SIM, and UAE-related part numbers do not support FaceTime either. With the JA (Japan) part number, even in silent mode, the photo shutter sound cannot be muted.

text.title: View Product Features
text.description: The iPhone 13 CH is Apple's new flagship mobile phone that has entered the market with several new features and a dual camera. The iPhone 13 display is equipped with a Super Retina panel to provide very desirable images to the user. This display has a very high resolution; so much so that in its 6.1-inch size, it packs about 460 pixels per inch. It is possible to charge the battery of this phone wirelessly. Face detection using the front camera is another feature used in the new Apple iPhone. In terms of hardware, this phone uses the new A15 chip, which has 15 billion transistors and offers desirable heat control so that, in addition to normal tasks, it can support new virtual reality features that Apple is particularly focusing on these days. According to Apple itself, this phone has a speed 50 times that of its version 12. The processor has a new modular design that has significantly reduced battery consumption, giving you greater battery life. The display quality on the iPhone 13 is 120 Hz and you will witness high quality. Apple has included a GPU in this series of its iPhone phones that is 30 percent faster than its series 12 phones, and this promises that you can run games with heavier and larger graphics and maps. One of the features we see in the iPhone 13 is its cinematic ProRes video recording system, which can revolutionize mobile phone videography. Not active phones become active by inserting internal SIM cards, and unlike the active model, the product seal is not broken. Active Apple brand phones are also like this because due to limitations on some Apple products for Iran, they are officially activated and sealed with a single insertion of a SIM card in neighboring countries, and you should know that this process does not cause any problems regarding the product warranty. European, Japanese, and UAE part numbers are single SIM, and UAE-related part numbers do not support FaceTime either. With the JA (Japan) part number, even in silent mode, the photo shutter sound cannot be muted.

At first glance, you will completely realize that you are facing a powerful and flagship smartphone. Attractive and even different design that has given a special visual appeal to this smartphone. The fingerprint sensor, as a very practical security feature, is placed under the screen, and according to tests, you should know that this optical sensor can provide very fast performance in unlocking the screen.
